scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && DB_CONTAINER=schautrack-test-db-1 npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts && DB_CONTAINER=schautrack-test-db-1 npx playwright test; docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && DB_CONTAINER=schautrack-test-db-1 npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts && DB_CONTAINER=schautrack-test-db-1 npx playwright test --ui; docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:setup: docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -p schautrack-test -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && DB_CONTAINER=schautrack-test-db-1 npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts
